translations.1. To \"Continue\" Receiving Push Notifi:
1. To "Continue" Receiving Push Notifications — "Send Important Notifications": **Notification permissions are fully enabled! Notification permissions are fully enabled! Notification permissions are fully enabled!** It's so important that we say it three times. At this point, the code requesting permissions earlier effectively requests all permissions at once, which is quite significant.  
   Or continue receiving silent notifications

2. "Off" — Tapping "Turn Off All Notifications" completely disables push notifications (including silent notifications).

translations.iOS 12的這項通知貼心優化，讓使用者跟開發者之間對通知功能更容易達搭起互動的: This thoughtful notification improvement in iOS 12 builds a better bridge for interaction between users and developers regarding notification features, helping to avoid users permanently disabling notifications.
translations.「關閉」 — 「關閉所有通知」點擊後完全關閉推播通知（含靜音通知）。\n: "Off" — Tapping "Turn Off All Notifications" completely disables push notifications (including silent notifications).
translations.先來張圖整理一下靜音通知會顯示的時機：\n\n: First, here is a diagram summarizing when silent notifications will appear:
translations.前陣子在改善APP推播通知允許及點擊率過低問題，做了些優化調整；最初版的時候體驗: Recently, I worked on improving the low permission and click rates of app push notifications with some optimizations. In the initial version, the experience was very poor—the app immediately showed the "App wants to send notifications" prompt upon launch. Naturally, the denial rate was very high. Based on statistics of actual notification displays using [Notification Service Extension](../cb6eba52a342/), it is estimated that only about 10% of users allowed push notifications.
translations.可以看到如果是靜音推播通知，APP在背景狀態下收到通知時 **不會跳出橫幅、不會: You can see that for silent push notifications, when the app receives a notification in the background, **no banner will appear, no sound alert, no badge update, and it will not show on the lock screen; it will only appear in the Notification Center when the phone is unlocked and pulled down**:
translations.可以看到您的發送的推播通知，並且會自動聚合成一個分類\n\n: You can see the push notifications you sent, and they will automatically be grouped into a category.
translations.在做上面這個優化項目時發現 UserNotifications iOS 12 中: When working on the above optimization, I discovered that UserNotifications in iOS 12 introduced a new .provisional permission. Simply put, it is a temporary notification permission that **allows sending push notifications (silent notifications) to users without showing the permission prompt**. Let’s look at its actual effects and limitations.
Add the authorizationStatus .provisional case when checking the current notification permission in the code (iOS 12 and later only):
translations.如果使用者還在猶豫或想使用看看再決定要不要接收通知，可按右上角「略過」，避免一開: If the user is still unsure or wants to try before deciding whether to receive notifications, they can tap "Skip" at the top right. This avoids the irreversible result of tapping "Don't Allow" due to unfamiliarity with the app at the start, which prevents future permission prompts.
translations.對使用者來說，往往跳詢問通知視窗時不知該按下允許還是拒絕因為我們不知道開發者會傳: For users, when the notification permission prompt appears, they often don't know whether to allow or deny because they don't know what kind of notifications the developer will send. It could be ads or important messages. The unknown is scary, so most people tend to play it safe and press deny first.
translations.對開發者來說，我們精心準備了許多項目包含重要消息要推送給使用者知道，但就因上述問: For developers, we carefully prepare many items, including important messages to notify users, but due to the issues mentioned above, users block them, wasting the effort we put into crafting the content!
translations.我們將以上程式加入 AppDelegate didFinishLaunching: We add the above code to AppDelegate's didFinishLaunchingWithOptions and then launch the app. You will notice that no notification permission prompt appears; at this point, go to **Settings** to check **App Notification Settings**.
translations.我們就這樣默默地取得了靜音通知權限🏆\n\n: We quietly obtained provisional notification permission 🏆
translations.按「允許」取得所有通知權限、按「不允許」關閉所有通知權限(含本來取得的靜音通知權: Tap "Allow" to get all notification permissions, tap "Don't Allow" to disable all notification permissions (including previously granted provisional permissions).
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.此功能可讓開發者把握使用者剛安裝APP時的機會，設計好推播流程、內容，對使用者優: This feature allows developers to seize the opportunity when users first install the app, design the notification flow and content, prioritize pushing items of interest to users, increase their awareness of the app’s notifications, track notification click rates, and prompt users to opt-in for notifications at the right time.
translations.此展開的詢問視窗只會出現在「臨時權限」時靜音推播之下\n\n: This expanded permission prompt only appears under silent push notifications with "provisional" authorization.
translations.目前的問題大概就是….iOS 12的用戶還太少🤐\n\n: The current issue is that there are still too few iOS 12 users 🤐
translations.目前調整新安裝引導流程、配合介面優化將詢問通知視窗的跳出時機調整如下：\n\n: Currently, the new installation onboarding process is adjusted, and the timing for prompting the notification permission dialog is optimized as follows:
translations.要「繼續」接收推播 — 「傳送重要通知」： **通知權限就全開了！通知權限就全開:
To "Continue" Receiving Push Notifications — "Send Important Notifications": **Notification permissions are fully enabled! Notification permissions are fully enabled! Notification permissions are fully enabled!** It's so important that we say it three times. At this point, the code requesting permissions earlier effectively requests all permissions at once, which is quite significant.  
Or continue receiving silent notifications
translations.要求通知權限的部分拿掉 .provisional 就能依然正常詢問使用者要不要允: Removing .provisional from the notification permission request will still properly ask the user whether to allow notifications:
translations.都是可以再跳出通知詢問視窗問使用者允不允許接收通知的\n\n: Both can still prompt the user with a notification permission request window.
translations.雖然能曝光的地方只有 **通知中心** 但有曝光有機會；換個角度想，我們是使用者: Although the only visible place is the **Notification Center**, having any exposure is still an opportunity; from another perspective, if we were users and didn’t allow notifications, an app sending a bunch of notifications with banners, sounds, and lock screen alerts would feel very intrusive (just like the competing side XD). Apple's approach strikes a balance between users and developers.
translations.靜音通知是iOS 12對通知優化推出的新設定與臨時權限無關，只不過是程式那端拿到:
Silent notifications are a new setting optimized for notifications in iOS 12 and are not directly related to provisional authorization. However, once the app obtains provisional authorization, it can send silent notifications. Setting an app's notifications to silent is simple. One way is to go to "Settings" - "Notifications" - find the app, turn off all permissions except "Notification Center" (as shown in Figure 1), which results in silent notifications.  
Alternatively, when receiving an app notification, press and hold to expand it, then tap the "…" in the top right corner and select "Deliver Quietly" to achieve the same effect:
